overall.description: A cinematic drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city highway. The camera moves steadily along a multi-lane road past a large construction site, billboards, and dense urban architecture. Flying vehicles and heavy traffic populate the scene, characteristic of the game Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: black SUV overtakes in the left lane
military-style truck overtakes on the left
green sports car overtakes on the left

agents.ego_description: driving steadily in the right lane alongside a metal noise barrier, passing a large construction site

notable_agents.action: military truck overtaking at high speed in the left lane

entered.detail: large building under construction with green scaffolding and exposed framework
tall metal barrier with horizontal slats running alongside the highway
concrete barrier separating opposing traffic lanes

segments.scene_description: Driving along a multi-lane highway with a large construction site visible on the right side. The metal noise barrier runs parallel to the road. Several vehicles overtake in the left lane including a military truck and a green sports car. The sky is clear and blue.

events.description: large advertising billboards on the right temporarily block view of the construction site
flying debris or objects visible in the sky above the highway

agents.ego_description: driving past large advertising billboards mounted on the right side of the highway

entered.detail: large vertical billboards with advertisements including DTR logo and product images

segments.scene_description: The camera drives past large advertising billboards that line the right side of the highway, temporarily obscuring the construction site which now appears further ahead. Flying debris is visible in the sky. The urban skyline becomes visible in the distance beyond the construction site.

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right
merging traffic from the right as the highway widens

agents.ego_description: driving toward the dense city skyline with heavy traffic in all lanes

notable_agents.action: flying car passing overhead across the highway

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with neon signs and billboards
elevated train track structure running parallel to the highway
tall buildings with large digital advertisements on the left side

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up to reveal a dense cyberpunk city skyline ahead with towering buildings covered in neon signs and digital billboards. An elevated monorail track runs along the left side. A flying vehicle passes overhead. Traffic density increases as the road approaches the city center.

events.description: passing under large overhead monorail bridge structure
road curves slightly to the right while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic while passing under overhead structures and following the curve of the road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel in the left lane

entered.detail: large metal bridge carrying monorail tracks spanning across the highway
tall yellow industrial structure with pipes and scaffolding on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under a massive overhead monorail bridge structure that spans the highway. The road curves slightly to the right, revealing more of the dense urban architecture including a distinctive yellow industrial building on the right. Traffic continues to flow in multiple lanes as the journey progresses deeper into the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a multi-lane highway that transforms from an industrial outskirts area into a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by passing a large construction site and a metal noise barrier under a clear blue sky, as a military truck and a green sports car overtake in the left lane. As the camera moves forward, large advertising billboards line the right side of the road, momentarily obscuring the construction site before the urban skyline emerges in the distance. The scene then opens up to reveal a towering city center filled with digital signs and an elevated monorail track, with traffic density increasing as a flying vehicle passes overhead. Finally, the camera glides under a massive overhead monorail bridge and curves slightly to the right, passing a distinctive yellow industrial building as it plunges deeper into the heart of the urban architecture.
